blended.narrative: Kicking Horse is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,155 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.1" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 4" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
